description_long: A thick, bone-in steak rests atop a rectangular wooden cutting board, its surface seared to a deep brown with visible caramelization and a slight sheen from rendered fat. The steak is robust and substantial, with a pronounced bone running along one side and a layer of golden-brown fat at the edge. The meat displays a textured, slightly uneven surface, with some areas appearing more charred than others, suggesting a high-heat cooking method. The cutting board beneath is light-colored wood, showing faint knife marks and some juices pooling around the steak, adding to the realism. No garnishes or additional plating elements are present, focusing attention solely on the steak and its natural presentation. The overall impression is of a hearty, freshly cooked steak ready to be served in a casual or urban outdoor setting.
description: A thick, bone-in steak with a seared, caramelized surface sits on a light wooden cutting board, glistening with rendered fat and meat juices.
description_view_0: From this angle, the steak's broad, seared top and the bone along the right edge are clearly visible, with juices pooling on the cutting board.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the steak's thickness, the pronounced bone, and the golden-brown fat layer beneath the meat.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the rounded end of the steak and the bone protruding slightly, with less visible fat and more of the cutting board exposed.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the steak's length, the browned exterior, and the way the bone and fat run along the bottom edge.
attribute_grill_marks: Grill marks are faint and irregular, with no clear crosshatch or parallel pattern visible.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, mostly concentrated along the edge and near the bone.
